config.script:
'tree services #include "50617"
function fopen() : fopen = true tsrs_fopen() page_.cmdenabled CMD_SAVEFORM, false end function
function fclose() tsrs_fclose() end function
function new_custombuilder() set new_custombuilder = g_pTSRS.new_custombuilder() end function
function prepare_explorer(byref pPB) set prepare_explorer = tsrs_new_explorer(pPB) end function
dim g_pLastTreeDef : set g_pLastTreeDef = nothing dim g_nTypeId : g_nTypeId = 0 dim g_nIdObj : g_nIdObj = 0
function show(byref pTreeDef,byval strTitle,nTypeId,nIdObj) '--- some setup page_.topelement.title = strTitle page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DEST_HEADER).text = strTitle
'--- make initial fill set g_pLastTreeDef = pTreeDef g_nTypeId = nTypeId g_nIdObj = nIdObj frefresh
show = page_.domodalauto() end function
function frefresh() page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DEST_TABLE).body.removeall tsrs_start page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DEST_TABLE),g_pLastTreeDef,g_nTypeId,g_nIdObj end function
function get_dest_table() set get_dest_table = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DEST_TABLE) end function
'------------------------------------------------------------ ' item selected - reload second pane '------------------------------------------------------------ function on_item_selected_hli(byref pHLI) '-- clean dim pSecondPane : set pSecondPane = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SECOND_PANE) pSecondPane.removeall
'-- retrieve param dim nTypeId : nTypeId = pHLI(APPVAR_PARAM_TYPEID) dim nIdObj : nIdObj = pHLI(APPVAR_PARAM_IDOBJ) #ifdef _DEBUG if nTypeid = 10108 then dim pCard : set pCard = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_WIZARD_PAGE varDestPage=20132 varObject=" + cstr(nidobj)) with pCard .set_external_data nIdObj .fill_external_container pSecondPane end with else dim pDataObject : set pDataObject = trans_.getobj(nTypeId,nIdObj) pSecondPane.addnew(0,-1).text = pDataObject.text end if #endif
end function
